Notes.Text:
This update for GraphicsMagick fixes the following issue

- CVE-2026-46523: heap-use-after-free via a crafted MSL image (bsc#1268125).

Vulnerabilities.Description: ImageMagick is free and open-source software used for editing and manipulating digital images. Prior to versions 7.1.2.23 and 6.9.13-48, a crafted MSL image can trigger a heap-use-after-free. Versions 7.1.2.23 and 6.9.13-48 fix the issue.
